case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SHONNA M COOK

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, SHONNA M

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, SHONNA M $3,223.54 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,507.54, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-18-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
